item.title: Betty Boop Rouge-Billetero HS Rojo 15.5 x 10 cm
item.description: Tienes Betty Boop Rouge-Billetero HS Rojo 15.5 x 10 cm aqui! 🔎: Compartimento central con cremallera para monedas y billetes Dimensiones: 10 x 15,5 x 2,5 cm Asa lateral extraible Billetero con 7 compartimentos para tarjetas de crédito o documentos de identidad 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
